## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town.com and GrowthX Labs to discuss content strategy, production, and performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/hqQcBZ6KBBetwtxxbX3REKP3K_HBjKdm?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
